questions.q: In which primary Indian film industry did director S. S. Rajamouli build his career?
questions.explanation: S. S. Rajamouli is a Telugu film director, though his films achieved nationwide and international reach.

questions.q: Which two-part epic directed by S. S. Rajamouli was released in 2015 and 2017?
questions.explanation: The Baahubali duology, comprising Baahubali: The Beginning (2015) and Baahubali: The Conclusion (2017), was directed by S. S. Rajamouli.

questions.q: In which year was S. S. Rajamouli's film RRR released?
questions.explanation: RRR, directed by S. S. Rajamouli, was released in 2022.

questions.q: The famous line 'Why Kattappa killed Baahubali?' became a cultural phenomenon after which S. S. Rajamouli film?
questions.explanation: Baahubali: The Beginning (2015) ended on a cliffhanger that sparked the nationwide question 'Why Kattappa killed Baahubali?'

questions.q: S. S. Rajamouli's 2012 film Eega centres on a man reincarnated as which creature seeking revenge?
questions.explanation: In Eega (2012), the murdered protagonist is reborn as a housefly and sets out to avenge his death.

questions.q: Which actor played the dual role of Amarendra Baahubali and Mahendra Baahubali in S. S. Rajamouli's Baahubali films?
questions.explanation: Prabhas played both Amarendra Baahubali and his son Mahendra Baahubali in the Baahubali duology.

questions.q: In which year was S. S. Rajamouli born?
questions.explanation: S. S. Rajamouli was born on 10 October 1973.

questions.q: Which 2009 S. S. Rajamouli reincarnation epic starred Ram Charan in his second film?
questions.explanation: Magadheera (2009), a reincarnation epic and Ram Charan's second film, was directed by S. S. Rajamouli.

questions.q: The two lead characters in S. S. Rajamouli's RRR are based on which two real Indian revolutionaries?
options: Subhas Chandra Bose and Bhagat Singh
Alluri Sitarama Raju and Komaram Bheem
questions.explanation: RRR fictionalises the lives of real freedom fighters Alluri Sitarama Raju and Komaram Bheem.

questions.q: Which actor portrayed the warrior Komaram Bheem in S. S. Rajamouli's RRR?
questions.explanation: N. T. Rama Rao Jr. (Jr. NTR) played Komaram Bheem in RRR.

questions.q: Which song from S. S. Rajamouli's RRR won the Academy Award for Best Original Song in 2023?
questions.explanation: 'Naatu Naatu' from RRR won the Oscar for Best Original Song at the 95th Academy Awards in 2023.

questions.q: Which composer scored the music for S. S. Rajamouli's Baahubali films and RRR?
questions.explanation: M. M. Keeravani, who is also Rajamouli's cousin, composed the music for the Baahubali films and RRR.

questions.q: Who wrote the stories and screenplays for S. S. Rajamouli's major films, including the Baahubali series and RRR?
questions.explanation: K. V. Vijayendra Prasad, S. S. Rajamouli's father, wrote the stories and screenplays for his major films.

questions.q: Which actor played the loyal slave-warrior Kattappa in S. S. Rajamouli's Baahubali films?
questions.explanation: Veteran actor Sathyaraj played Kattappa in the Baahubali duology.

questions.q: Which actor played the antagonist Bhallaladeva in S. S. Rajamouli's Baahubali films?
questions.explanation: Rana Daggubati portrayed the villainous Bhallaladeva in the Baahubali series.

questions.q: Which actress played the matriarch and queen mother Sivagami in S. S. Rajamouli's Baahubali films?
questions.explanation: Ramya Krishnan played the powerful queen mother Sivagami in the Baahubali duology.

questions.q: Which 2001 Telugu film marked S. S. Rajamouli's debut as a feature film director?
questions.explanation: S. S. Rajamouli made his directorial debut with Student No. 1 (2001), starring N. T. Rama Rao Jr.

questions.q: In S. S. Rajamouli's RRR, which British colonial figures serve as the principal antagonists?
options: Governor Scott Buxton and his wife Catherine
questions.explanation: Governor Scott Buxton and his wife Catherine are the chief British antagonists in RRR.

questions.q: Which 2007 fantasy film directed by S. S. Rajamouli featured N. T. Rama Rao Jr. in a story involving the god of death, Yama?
questions.explanation: Yamadonga (2007), directed by S. S. Rajamouli, starred N. T. Rama Rao Jr. in a tale set partly in Yama's realm.

questions.q: Which actress played the warrior Avantika in S. S. Rajamouli's Baahubali: The Beginning?
questions.explanation: Tamannaah played the warrior Avantika in Baahubali: The Beginning (2015).

questions.q: Which actress played the princess Devasena in S. S. Rajamouli's Baahubali films?
questions.explanation: Anushka Shetty portrayed Devasena, the mother of Mahendra Baahubali, in the Baahubali duology.

questions.q: Which 2005 S. S. Rajamouli film starred Prabhas as a refugee who rises to lead and protect a community?
questions.explanation: Chatrapathi (2005), directed by S. S. Rajamouli, starred Prabhas as a refugee who becomes a protector of his people.

questions.q: Which 2004 S. S. Rajamouli sports film, built around the game of rugby, starred Nithiin?
questions.explanation: Sye (2004), directed by S. S. Rajamouli and starring Nithiin, was structured around a college rugby match.

questions.q: S. S. Rajamouli's 2010 film Maryada Ramanna, a comedy set against a family feud, was inspired by which silent-era Hollywood comedian's film?
questions.explanation: Maryada Ramanna (2010) was inspired by Buster Keaton's silent comedy Our Hospitality (1923).

questions.q: Which 2006 S. S. Rajamouli action film starred Ravi Teja in a dual role and was later remade in Hindi as Rowdy Rathore?
questions.explanation: Vikramarkudu (2006) starred Ravi Teja in a dual role and was remade in several languages, including the Hindi film Rowdy Rathore (2012).

questions.q: At the 95th Academy Awards, the song 'Naatu Naatu' from RRR was credited to composer M. M. Keeravani and which lyricist?
questions.explanation: Lyricist Chandrabose shared the Oscar for Best Original Song with composer M. M. Keeravani for 'Naatu Naatu'.

questions.q: Which two actresses played the female leads opposite the heroes in S. S. Rajamouli's RRR?
questions.explanation: Alia Bhatt played Sita and Olivia Morris played Jenny in RRR.

questions.q: S. S. Rajamouli's father and screenwriter K. V. Vijayendra Prasad also wrote the story for which 2015 Salman Khan Hindi film?
questions.explanation: K. V. Vijayendra Prasad wrote the story for Bajrangi Bhaijaan (2015), in addition to his son's Telugu epics.

questions.q: Which S. S. Rajamouli film won the National Film Award for Best Feature Film at the 63rd National Film Awards?
questions.explanation: Baahubali: The Beginning (2015) won the National Film Award for Best Feature Film at the 63rd National Film Awards.

questions.q: Before its Academy Award win, the song 'Naatu Naatu' from S. S. Rajamouli's RRR won which other major international award in January 2023?
options: The BAFTA for Best Original Score
The Critics' Choice Award for Best Picture
The Golden Globe for Best Original Song
questions.explanation: 'Naatu Naatu' from RRR won the Golden Globe for Best Original Song in January 2023, ahead of its Oscar win at the 95th Academy Awards.
